title: Woodland Adventure
description: Lush landscapes mixed with bustling wildlife, paired with origins so you and your friends can join the woodland adventure.
body:
![Woodland Adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65783bf394e2564bb89ba8cd82e33192c1b76c52.jpeg)

# **Join The Woodland Adventure**
In this modpack, you will choose from a variety of animal origins to embody as you traverse a world of vast landscapes and lively wildlife all kept neat and simple for low end devices. Hold a grand adventure in singleplayer, or build a woodland community with friends, this pack provides everything you need for either.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nHclAUO5m2Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## _Vast Landscapes_
Pairing the Nature's Spirit mod with Os' Colorful Grasses recource pack, we get lush mountain sides, high peering cliffs, and rising savannas to meet your adventuring needs.
![Mountain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/893c12e2dbd7385f95c3d36eea59cf07c1263d74.png)

## _Extensive Wildlife_
Utilizing Animal Garden, Naturalists, and Spawn mods we get a large variety of animals to occupy such a lushious world.
![Bird](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaa13cc584c4f2f75deccb6f3ba86f3ad6fabbc9.png)

## _Farmer's Delight_
Farmer's Delight is the perfect mod to add to this mod pack. if you havent already, show some love to the creators as well as the creators of all the other mods in this pack.
![Knife](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/729b6e2f7e72fae359bafa85fc9d8780f50bdb59.png)

## _Performance_
As always, there are many performance mods in this pack to keep the game running as smoothly as possible no matter the device you are on.
